name: Team Member Workload Report
query:
SELECT 
    t.assigned_to AS "Team Member",
    u.full_name AS "Full Name",
    COUNT(*) AS "Total Tasks",
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Completed Tasks",
    ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100, 2) AS "Completion Percentage"
FROM `tabTask` t
LEFT JOIN `tabUser` u ON u.name = t.assigned_to
GROUP BY t.assigned_to, u.full_name
ORDER BY "Completion Percentage" DESC;
